title: Why Your Shop Vac Keeps Clogging on Drywall Dust (and How to Actually Stop It)
excerpt: Drywall dust kills shop vac suction in minutes. Here's exactly why it happens — and the fix that keeps your filter breathing and your motor alive.

title: Disposable Shop Vac Bags Don't Wear Out — They Fail Mid-Job
excerpt: A disposable vac bag doesn't fade gracefully — it rips or blows out and dumps your whole load back onto the floor. Here's why it happens and how to stop it.

title: Why Your Shop Vac Lost Its Suction (and How to Get It Back)
excerpt: Shop vac barely pulling air? Suction loss almost always traces back to one of four things. Here's how to find it fast — and keep it from coming back.
